{{ template "base" . }} {{ define "extraHead" }} {{ end }} {{ define "content" }}
🎨 {{ call .T "color.nav.hub" }} 💧 {{ call .T "color.nav.picker" }} 🎨 {{ call .T "color.nav.palette" }} ⭕ {{ call .T "color.nav.wheel" }} 🔄 {{ call .T "color.nav.converter" }} ⚖️ {{ call .T "color.nav.contrast" }} 🌈 {{ call .T "color.nav.gradient" }} 🖼️ {{ call .T "color.nav.imagePicker" }} 👁️ {{ call .T "color.nav.blindness" }} 🏷️ {{ call .T "color.nav.names" }} 💧 {{ call .T "color.nav.mixer" }} 💨 {{ call .T "color.nav.tailwind" }}
{{- template "partials/ad_slot.html" dict "SlotID" "color-tools-top" "Size" "728x90" "Mobile" "320x50" "ClientID" .AdsClientID "Enabled" .AdsEnabled }}
🔒 {{ call .T "color.hero.badge.privacy" }} ⚡ {{ call .T "color.hero.badge.free" }} 🔧 {{ call .T "color.hero.badge.tools" }}

{{ call .T "color.hero.title" }}

{{ call .T "color.hero.subtitle" }}

{{ if eq .ActiveTool "tools" }}
💧

{{ call .T "color.nav.picker" }}

{{ call .T "color.picker.subtitle" }}
🎨

{{ call .T "color.nav.palette" }}

{{ call .T "color.palette.subtitle" }}

Space ⌨️
⭕

{{ call .T "color.nav.wheel" }}

{{ call .T "color.wheel.subtitle" }}
🔄

{{ call .T "color.nav.converter" }}

{{ call .T "color.converter.subtitle" }}
⚖️

{{ call .T "color.nav.contrast" }}

{{ call .T "color.contrast.subtitle" }}

APCA
🌈

{{ call .T "color.nav.gradient" }}

{{ call .T "color.gradient.subtitle" }}

OKLCH
🖼️

{{ call .T "color.nav.imagePicker" }}

{{ call .T "color.imagepicker.subtitle" }}
👁️

{{ call .T "color.nav.blindness" }}

{{ call .T "color.blindness.subtitle" }}
🏷️

{{ call .T "color.nav.names" }}

{{ call .T "color.names.subtitle" }}

2000+
🔮

{{ call .T "color.nav.mixer" }}

{{ call .T "color.mixer.subtitle" }}
💨

{{ call .T "color.nav.tailwind" }}

{{ call .T "color.tailwind.subtitle" }}
🔒

{{ call .T "color.feature.privacy.title" }}

{{ call .T "color.feature.privacy.desc" }}

⚡

{{ call .T "color.feature.speed.title" }}

{{ call .T "color.feature.speed.desc" }}

🎁

{{ call .T "color.feature.free.title" }}

{{ call .T "color.feature.free.desc" }}

{{ end }} {{ if eq .ActiveTool "picker" }}

{{ call .T "color.picker.title" }}

{{ call .T "color.picker.subtitle" }}

{{ end }} {{ if eq .ActiveTool "palette" }}

{{ call .T "color.palette.title" }}

{{ call .T "color.palette.subtitle" }}

{{ end }} {{ if eq .ActiveTool "wheel" }}

{{ call .T "color.wheel.title" }}

{{ call .T "color.wheel.subtitle" }}

{{ end }} {{ if eq .ActiveTool "converter" }}

{{ call .T "color.converter.title" }}

{{ call .T "color.converter.subtitle" }}

{{ end }} {{ if eq .ActiveTool "contrast" }}

{{ call .T "color.contrast.title" }}

{{ call .T "color.contrast.subtitle" }}

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
{{ end }} {{ if eq .ActiveTool "gradient" }}

{{ call .T "color.gradient.title" }}

{{ call .T "color.gradient.subtitle" }}


      
    

  



{{ end }}


{{ if eq .ActiveTool "image-picker" }}


  
{{ call .T "color.imagepicker.title" }}

  
{{ call .T "color.imagepicker.subtitle" }}

{{ call .T "color.imagepicker.upload" }}

      
{{ call .T "color.imagepicker.paste" }}

      
{{ call .T "color.imagepicker.supported" }}

{{- template "partials/ad_slot.html" dict "SlotID" "color-tools-sidebar" "Size" "300x250" "MobileHide" true "ClientID" .AdsClientID "Enabled" .AdsEnabled }}

    {{ range $i, $item := .FAQ }}
    

      {{ $item.q }} ▼
      
{{ $item.a }}

    

    {{ end }}
  





{{- template "partials/ad_slot.html" dict "SlotID" "color-tools-bottom" "Size" "728x90" "Mobile" "320x50" "ClientID" .AdsClientID "Enabled" .AdsEnabled }}

Space {{ call .T "color.keyboard.space" }}

    
L {{ call .T "color.keyboard.lock" }}

    
← → {{ call .T "color.keyboard.left" }}

    
C {{ call .T "color.keyboard.copy" }}

    
Del {{ call .T "color.keyboard.delete" }}

  






{{ end }}
